title: euphoria cinerea
intro: Euphoria cinerea, also known as Spilanthes acmella, is a tropical plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the Americas and Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Euphoria cinerea include its ability to stimulate saliva production, which can aid in digestion and oral health, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Euphoria cinerea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical ointment, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
